_publications._publicationTitle: A transcriptomic, proteomic, and functional genetic atlas dissects neurofibromin function in the peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: CRISPRi sgNF1 iPNs showed no difference in biochemical sensitivity compared to sgNTC iPNs
details: CRISPRi sgNF1 iPNs showed no difference in biochemical sensitivity to SHP2 inhibitor RMC 4550 compared to sgNTC iPNs
